message:
test(luahelper): 42 unit tests + fix circular reference detection bug (wa-24t00)

The recursive calls in lua_value_to_dynamic_impl (lines 199, 227, 229)
were calling the public lua_value_to_dynamic which creates a fresh
visited HashSet, breaking cycle detection for nested tables and causing
stack overflow. Fixed by calling lua_value_to_dynamic_impl with the
propagated visited set instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,3 +12,7 @@ bstr.workspace = true
 log.workspace = true
 mlua.workspace = true
 frankenterm-dynamic.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+ordered-float.workspace = true
+mlua = { workspace = true, features = ["vendored", "lua54", "send"] }
